notes: The in-app Browser mock session resolved the org shortcut through the auth/persona fallback to individual home before rendering an org page.

No stale shortlist UI was exposed in Browser. Route-level behavior is covered by tests/ui/org-shortlist-page-redirect.test.tsx, which proves /app/o/[slug]/shortlist redirects to /app/o/[slug]/assignments.
Component-level copy is covered by tests/ui/org-shortlist-client.test.tsx.
